data.title: Gray Oak Power launches in Houston offering firm power solutions for US data centers to stabilize and accelerate development.
data.description: Gray Oak Power has been established with a primary goal of assisting data center developers and owners in the United States to expedite their operations. By providing on-site, reliable power infrastructure, Gray Oak Power allows data centers to stabilize their facilities years before connecting to utility services. The company was launched on January 15, 2026, in Houston. This innovative approach aims to bring benefits to data centers across the US by ensuring a smooth and efficient operation process.

data.title: Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) completes 1-for-5 reverse stock split, aiming to restructure stock value.
data.description: Amcor plc, a top global company specializing in responsible packaging solutions, disclosed its successful completion of a 1-for-5 reverse stock split. This strategic move, approved by Amcor's management, aims to enhance shareholder value. Trading under the tickers NYSE: AMCR and ASX: AMC, Amcor continues to solidify its position as an influential player in the industry.

data.title: Stoli Group's U.S. entities, Stoli Group USA, LLC and Kentucky Owl LLC, are converting from Chapter 11 to Chapter 7 bankruptcy.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 15, 2026, Stoli Group revealed that its American entities, Stoli Group USA, LLC and Kentucky Owl LLC, have submitted a request to transition from Chapter 11 to Chapter 7. This move will involve the transfer of supervision for these entities to a trustee assigned by the court. The decision suggests a significant change in the management of the U.S. branches of Stoli Group, marking a shift in the control structure of the businesses.

data.title: Bank of America, Citi, JPMorgan, and Wells Fargo all report lower earnings amid threat of credit card rate cap by President Trump.
data.description: This week, major financial institutions Bank of America, Citi, JPMorgan, and Wells Fargo all reported challenging earnings results against the backdrop of President Trump's proposed cap on credit card rates. The uncertainty surrounding this issue has weighed heavily on the banking sector, with many investors closely watching how these influential banks navigate through this challenging period.

data.title: Introducing vyv™: Personalized vitamins for women, tailored daily packs, expert support, and focus on energy and hormones.
data.description: In Snoqualmie, Washington on January 15, 2026, vyv™ launched a new approach to women's wellness with personalized daily packs, expert support, and nutrition aimed at addressing energy, focus, hormones, and real-life challenges. Recognizing the common struggle of starting a wellness routine only to abandon it by week three, vyv™ offers a solution. This program provides tailored daily packs and expert guidance to help women stay on track with their wellness goals.
IDF: Initial report - Sirens sounded in Nahal Oz, the details are under review.

data.title: Morgan Stanley reports strong Q4 earnings, with $2.68 EPS, $4.397 billion net earnings, 38% stock surge, revenue of $17.89 billion, 18% YoY increase. CEO highlights growth and momentum.
data.description: In the latest financial report, Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) announced fourth-quarter 2025 earnings of $2.68 per share, showing an increase from $2.22 in the previous year and surpassing the estimated $2.41. Net earnings rose by 18% year over year to reach $4.397 billion. The company's stock has seen a remarkable 38% surge over the past year. The CEO and chairman, Ted Pick, expressed satisfaction with the performance and attributed it to strategic investments made over several years that have contributed to growth and momentum across the Integrated Firm. Morgan Stanley's revenue for 2025 stood at $17.89 billion, marking a 10% increase from the previous year and surpassing the consensus estimate of $17.77 billion. The expense efficiency ratio in 2025 was 68%, an improvement from 71% in the prior year, reflecting operational efficiency while maintaining investment in various sectors. The Return on Tangible Common Equity (ROTCE) was reported at 21.6% in 2025, up from 18.8% in the previous year. The company's Standardized Common Equity Tier 1 ratio... data.title: Dayana Velasco named CGO at Aventura Private Wealth, enhancing leadership team for strategic growth.
data.description: Located in Aventura, Florida, on January 15, 2026, Aventura Private Wealth, a Multi-Family Office and Registered Investment Advisor, has welcomed Dayana Velasco as the new Chief Growth Officer. This strategic addition aims to enhance the leadership team of the firm.

data.title: FHLB Dallas appoints 2 new members and reappoints 3 to its Affordable Housing Advisory Council, totaling 14 members.
data.description: In Dallas, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) has appointed two new members and reappointed three current members to its 14-member Affordable Housing Advisory Council. This council advises the FHLB Dallas Board of Directors on affordable housing and economic development matters across its District covering Arkansas, Louisiana, Mississippi, New Mexico, and Texas. The new members are Justin Brooks and another individual, joining the council to address important issues in the region.

data.title: Quantiphi patented AI-driven 3-way document comparison tool in Dociphi, marking success in enterprise document intelligence.
data.description: A patent has been awarded to Quantiphi, an AI-focused digital engineering company based in Marlborough, Massachusetts. The United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) granted the patent on Jan. 15, 2026. This patent is for the innovative AI-powered three-way document comparison feature integrated into Dociphi, a platform offered by Quantiphi. Quantiphi is renowned for its AI-driven solutions and this recognition underscores their expertise in this technology domain.

data.title: Artemis promotes Jesse Moran & Nick Reyes, welcomes new member Mark Mueller. Specializes in Industrial Tech.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, a Boston private equity firm called Artemis revealed the promotions of Jesse Moran and Nick Reyes. The company specializes in collaborating with unique Industrial Tech firms catering to the aerospace, defense, and life sciences sectors.

data.title: Cohen Veterans Network partners with McCormick Foundation to open mental health clinic in Kansas, serving over 181,000 post-9/11 veterans and families.
data.description: In Kansas, over 181,000 individuals including post-9/11 veterans, service members, and military family members have the opportunity to access top-notch healthcare at The Steven A. Cohen Military Family Clinic at Centerstone. This facility is part of the Cohen Veterans Network (CVN), which provides quality care to help those who have served or have family members in the military.

data.title: Luxury high-rise condo, Avra at Metropolitan Naples, under construction with occupancy expected in fall 2026. Prices start at $2M.
data.description: A new luxury condominium high-rise called Avra at Metropolitan Naples is currently under construction in Downtown Naples. The project is expected to be completed by fall 2026. The units are priced starting from $2 million. Avra at Metropolitan Naples promises to offer luxurious amenities and an upscale living experience to its residents.
